items.name: Miso Soup
items.notes: menu code N1; japanese soy bean paste soup; menu says seaweed; seaweed kept as seaweed (wakame, not nori)

items.name: Chicken Udon
items.notes: menu code N2; grilled chicken leg meat; menu says thick noodle

items.name: Vegetable Udon
items.notes: menu code N3; various vegetables; menu says thick noodle

items.name: Spicy Beef Udon
items.notes: menu code N4; spicy sauteed beef in broth; menu says thick noodle

items.name: Tempura Udon
items.notes: menu code N5; mixed tempura: 2 shrimp, 1 yam, 1 zucchini, 1 yellow onion, 2 green bean; menu says thick noodle

items.name: Donkotsu Ramen
items.notes: menu code N6; menu says cha-shu; donkotsu is the menu's spelling of tonkotsu

items.name: Spicy Seafood Ramen
items.notes: menu code N7; spicy korean ramen; various seafood; 2 pcs green mussel

items.name: Yakisoba
items.notes: menu code N8; stirred fried noodle; choice of meat: chicken, vegetable, steak, or shrimp; two printed prices, none picked

items.name: Children's Combo
items.notes: choose 2 items: chicken teriyaki, steak teriyaki, sesame chicken, mixed tempura, gyoza (4 pcs); combo box, no invented ingredient list

items.name: Chicken
items.notes: deep fried panko breaded chicken tender meat; katsu dipping sauce; served w/ rice, soup and salad

items.name: Pork
items.notes: deep fried panko breaded pork tender loin meat; katsu dipping sauce; served w/ rice, soup and salad

items.name: Chicken Teriyaki
items.notes: grilled chicken leg meat; sauteed cabbage; over rice

items.name: Steak Teriyaki
items.notes: grilled beef; sauteed cabbage; over rice

items.name: Sesame Chicken
items.notes: crispy deep fried chicken leg meat; sauteed cabbage; over rice; description prints no sesame

items.name: Mixed Tempura
items.notes: sauteed cabbage; deep fried 2 shrimp; vegetables: 1 onion, 1 yam, 1 zucchini, 2 green bean; tempura sauce on side; over rice
